critical_code_review_comments: Note on key counts: raw python json.load reports 1475 keys per locale, but i18n-sync-lint (which deduplicates and is the source of truth per D-121) correctly reports 1473 keys x 4 languages — matches expected target exactly. The 2-key delta is benign and consistent with how the lint normalises duplicate-flat-dotted keys (no action needed).
InlineInviteForm.tsx header now contains a clean D-122 audit trail explaining why the file is the sole invite form and where billing-blocking is handled — good for future maintainers.
EmployeeListSection.tsx comment at line ~10 is consistent with the new architecture (references InlineInviteForm not the deleted OrgInvitesSection).
